title: Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report (March 9, 2026 to M

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Block threat IPs for: Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report
iptables -A INPUT -s 28.1.2.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 4.3.2.8 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 6.0.7.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 7.1.0.30 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 28.1.2.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 4.3.2.8 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 6.0.7.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 7.1.0.30 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("28.1.2.1","4.3.2.8","6.0.7.1","7.1.0.30"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: Wordfence Intelligence Weekly WordPress Vulnerability Report
# Generated: 2026-03-22T03:27:54.180520+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-890cc59f4b96"
